code: import{useMemo}from'react';import{useQuery}from'@tanstack/react-query';import{fetchCostTimeframes}from'../api/azure';import{COST_TIMEFRAME_OPTIONS,mapTimeframeCatalog}from'../config/costTimeframes';/** Cost explorer presets from GET /costs/timeframes (static fallback when API unavailable). */export default function useCostTimeframes(){const _useQuery=useQuery({queryKey:['cost-timeframes'],queryFn:fetchCostTimeframes,staleTime:24*60*60000}),data=_useQuery.data;return useMemo(()=>{const catalog=data===null||data===void 0?void 0:data.timeframes;if(catalog!==null&&catalog!==void 0&&catalog.length){return mapTimeframeCatalog(catalog);}return COST_TIMEFRAME_OPTIONS;},[data]);}
